prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约27900名→30449名→25782名→37396名→42752名，整体呈波动后移趋势，尤其2024–2025年连续两年大幅后移，近两年累计后移约14900名；2025年基准位次约42752名；该校在广东省物理类招生计划2021–2022年均为23人，2023年25人，2024年36人，2025年53人，2026年计划77人，较2025年扩招约45.3%，扩招幅度显著，将大幅降低录取竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河北工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第107名，近年排名稳定在103–109区间，属中上游211层次；该校未出现在近年声誉评价及投档异常文件中，无明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第93，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；该校以工科见长，电气工程、化学工程与技术、材料科学与工程等为传统优势方向，虽未进入第五轮学科评估A-及以上等级，但作为河北省唯一211，在区域内认可度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、计算机类、电子信息/通信等专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中均被评为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，社会报考热度持续走高；广东省2026年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年增加约3.6%，竞争基数扩大，2025年物理类本科批436分，近年波动平稳；河北工业大学主校区位于天津市，非本省高校，在广东省无特殊地域偏好优势；但作为京津冀地区知名211，对广东省考生仍具一定跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次42752名、2026年大幅扩招约45.3%使位次数字显著增大（竞争减弱）、广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%及热门工科专业持续高热使报考热度略有回升（位次数字略减小），预测2026年最低位次约53868名，区间53368–54368名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 计算机科学与技术
- 人工智能。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 通信工程
- 自动化/机器人工程
- 物联网工程
- 金融学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化学工程与工艺
- 海洋技术
- 制药工程
- 能源与动力工程（芬兰校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年河北工业大学在广东省物理类大幅扩招，预测位次区间53368–54368名，较2025年明显后移。位次在此区间内的考生可以二档专业为主攻方向（通信工程、自动化、物联网工程等），一档专业（电气工程、计算机科学与技术、人工智能）作为冲刺目标，三档专业（化工与制药类、海洋技术等）作为稳妥保底。芬兰校区中外合作项目位次相对较低，适合有出国意向且能承担较高学费的考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 27,900 → 30,449 → 25,782 → 37,396 → 42,752, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, especially with significant backward shifts in 2024 and 2025, accumulating a backward shift of about 14,900 in the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 42,752; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong Province was 23 students in 2021 and 2022, 25 in 2023, 36 in 2024, 53 in 2025, and a planned 77 students in 2026, an increase of about 45.3% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will greatly reduce competition intensity for admission.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 107th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 103–109 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the university has not appeared in recent reputation evaluations or abnormal filing documents, with no obvious negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 93rd, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no abnormal increase in application attention; the university is known for engineering, with electrical engineering, chemical engineering and technology, materials science and engineering as traditional advantageous directions, although not reaching A- or above in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, as the only 211 in Hebei Province, it has high regional recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication were rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with social application heat continuing to rise; the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 2025, expanding the competition base; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 436 points, with stable fluctuations in recent years; the main campus of Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin, not a local university in the province, with no special regional preference advantage in Guangdong; however, as a well-known 211 in the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei region, it still has cross-provincial appeal for Guangdong candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 42,752, a significant enrollment expansion of about 45.3% in 2026 causing a notable increase in ranking numbers (reduced competition), an increase of about 3.6% in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province, and sustained high popularity of popular engineering majors leading to a slight rebound in application heat (slight decrease in ranking numbers), the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 53,868, with a range of 53,368–54,368.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Communication Engineering
- Automation/Robotics Engineering
- Internet of Things Engineering
- Finance.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Marine Technology
- Pharmaceutical Engineering
- Energy and Power Engineering (Finland Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Hebei University of Technology significantly expands enrollment in the Physics Category in Guangdong Province, with a predicted ranking range of 53,368–54,368, notably backward compared to 2025. Candidates within this ranking range should focus on Tier 2 majors (Communication Engineering, Automation, Internet of Things Engineering, etc.) as main targets, Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence) as sprint goals, and Tier 3 majors (Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical, Marine Technology, etc.) as safe backups. The Finland Campus Sino-foreign cooperative program has relatively lower rankings, suitable for candidates with study abroad intentions and the ability to bear higher tuition fees.
